notableEvents.label: Ke'Bryan Hayes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ke'Bryan Hayes grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Nick Gonzales to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Will Benson scores. Tyler Stephenson out at 2nd. Ke'Bryan Hayes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo flies out to center fielder Will Benson.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales grounds into a double play, shortstop Matt McLain to second baseman Sal Stewart to first baseman Spencer Steer. Jake Mangum to 3rd. Billy Cook out at 2nd. Nick Gonzales out at 1st.
